description: Guest folder sharing (ADR-0014): share:true emits a virtio-9p device exposing the operator's QMP_MCP_HOST_SHARE_DIR (verbatim, comma-escaped) under the fixed mount_tag 'share', with security_model=mapped-xattr. Read-only by default (readonly=on, shareReadonly). A PCI device, so q35 hosts it. TCG.
